# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted Problem Solver: Elevate DSA Practice with Azure OpenAI Coach
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI assistant guiding users through a LeetCode-style problem, highlighting real-time coding help, model-switching, and seamless integration with the coding workflow.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solver
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines a real-time code editor with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant to help users solve DSA problems more efficiently. The AI offers problem-solving guidance, model switching, and persistent chat within the practice environment, improving learning flow without leaving the editor.
- CTA: Try the AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind now
- Visual brief: Short to mid-length walkthrough video: show the in-editor AI chat guiding a LeetCode-style problem, model-switching UI, and real-time code execution. Include UI chrome, problem panel, code editor, and AI responses with subtle cyberpunk aesthetic elements.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
